inputsInspected.notes: Intent, scope, compatibility boundaries, and deferred Excel scope inspected.
JSON authority, derived Markdown, matrix, and downstream-consumption requirements inspected.
Technical approach, operational considerations, and safe-evidence rules inspected.
Slice, gate-fix, file-change, validation, security, and unavailable-tooling evidence inspected.
Completed phases include apply; nextRecommended was review.
Changed files are SDD instruction, shared contract, OpenSpec, README, and review reference artifacts only.
Canonical 96-control catalog inspected as sole control source.
Canonical per-change report JSON schema inspected.

formatter.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#testing.quality.formatter.available is false and command is empty.

testRunner.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#testing.test_runner.available is false; no test command is configured or run.

coverage.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#testing.coverage.available is false and command is empty.

build.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#verify.build_command is empty; repository has no build runner.

typeChecker.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#testing.quality.type_checker.available is false and command is empty.

linter.evidence: openspec/config.yaml#testing.quality.linter.available is false and command is empty.

runtimeChecks.unavailableToolingNote: No executable test runner/build/lint/typecheck/format/coverage command is configured; review uses static/manual artifact inspection and treats unavailable tooling as a non-blocking warning.

evidenceSummary.summary: Static/manual review confirms canonical JSON authority, derived Markdown compatibility, downstream JSON authority wording, safe-evidence boundaries, and deferred Excel/Python/workbook scope.
items: Canonical catalog has schemaName sdd-review.control-catalog, status canonical, expectedControlCount 96, and controls REV-CORP-001..REV-CORP-096/source items 1..96.
review-report.schema.json requires canonical per-change report identity, routing, evidence summaries, validation metadata, presentation metadata, and exactly 96 reviewMatrix rows.
sdd-review/SKILL.md requires JSON-first build/validation/read-back and derived Markdown generation/parity before success.
report-template.md preserves required sections and exact 10-column matrix header without Category column.
Shared persistence/post-apply/downstream phase skills recognize canonical review JSON as authoritative when present while preserving Markdown compatibility.
No Excel, Python, script, spreadsheet, or workbook generation artifacts were added.

operationalEvidenceSummary.summary: Operational impact is artifact integrity only; no runtime deployment, migration, monitoring, administration, backup, retention, cleanup, or reprocessing behavior is introduced.
items: Artifact integrity checks are represented by canonical JSON plus derived Markdown read-back/parity requirements.
Unavailable tooling is explicitly recorded as unavailable evidence, not passing evidence.
No operational production identifiers, raw logs, generated bytes, final-document-only values, or invented operational details were found in reviewed evidence.

changedFileSecurityHandoff.summary: Changed surface is SDD instruction/shared-contract/OpenSpec/README/reference JSON/Markdown artifacts. Security review should validate safe evidence, evidence-integrity, file-scope, tooling-transparency, and ownership-boundary controls without duplicating the 96-control matrix.
items: Changed files include skills/sdd-review/*, skills/_shared/persistence-contract.md, skills/_shared/sdd-post-apply-gates.md, downstream phase skills, README.md, openspec/specs/sdd-review-workflow/spec.md, and the change artifacts under openspec/changes/sdd-review-json-contract/.
design.md#secure-development-design classifies the change as security-impacting for evidence integrity, not application runtime behavior.
Security-review source-row matrix remains owned by sdd-review-security; this report does not duplicate it.
Evidence uses safe paths, section anchors, and sanitized summaries only.
